purpose: Read user's calendar, draft suggested meeting times, and send calendar invites on approval. Canonical example: read_calendar is read_only, but send_invite is external_reversible because the invite leaves the system to an external recipient.

actions.name: read_calendar
actions.description: Fetch the user's calendar events for a date range.

actions.name: draft_meeting_time
actions.description: Compute a suggested meeting time and store it in a draft state visible only to the user.

actions.name: send_invite
actions.description: Send a calendar invite to one or more external recipients. Reaches outside the system. Undo requires sending a cancellation email and per-recipient acknowledgment.

actions.name: delete_event
actions.description: Delete a calendar event without leaving an audit-trail event. Once gone, cannot be cleanly recovered from the agent side.
